safe_batching_limit_families.reason: Remaining complaint residue is split across records, routing, results, and broad complaint-procedure surfaces.
Remaining generic specialist process and entitlement surfaces are too entangled with routing and eligibility.
Remaining noisy bare ընդունում/պառկեցնում timing wording is still entangled with payment-dispute overlap.

explicitly_deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Explicitly deferred because of strong overlap with eligibility_status_coverage_root_v1.

partially_advanced_but_not_forced_furthe.note: No further safe move attempted because the remaining legal-basis strand is deferred.

suitable_shadow_or_adjudication_opportun.why: Split across multiple complaint/routing owners and better suited for shadow family disagreement logging than another narrow guard.
Boundary between referral-status policy and specialist routing confusion is now too nuanced for more phrase-level guards.
Bare ընդունում/պառկեցնում timing forms are split between admission policy and payment/dispute behavior.
High overlap with eligibility requires adjudication/telemetry support, not direct freeform routing.

must_remain_symbolic_or_bounded: complaint destination and complaint subtype routing
must_not_be_handed_to_broad_free_reasoni: free/subsidized care legal basis with entitlement overlap
referral, admission, hospitalization, or surgery access policy
phase6_readiness.recommended_phase6_boundary: Add constrained shadow/adjudication around family disagreements without changing symbolic owners or allowing free reasoning to invent policy answers.

recommended_next_step: Do not implement orchestration changes yet. Treat this as a clean Phase 5 stop and use the readiness notes to scope a bounded Phase 6 design document or shadow telemetry pass.
